name: NSCLC OS link — Cox proportional hazards (nonparametric baseline)
description: Cox proportional-hazards link from the week-8 relative tumor-size change to population overall survival for first-line NSCLC: S(t | x) = S0(t)^exp(beta * x), where the baseline survival S0(t) is a NONPARAMETRIC tabulated curve (not a closed-form distribution) — the feature that distinguishes a Cox model from the parametric Weibull link. Marked non-default, so it does not auto-collide with the Weibull OS link; select it explicitly via survival_link= to compare survival-model choice. Population/trial-level only; NOT a personal prognosis. Values illustrative and unverified.

parameters.label: log-hazard coefficient on week-8 relative change

extraction.tier_rationale: Link strength varies across trials and tumor types.
